topic: Summerlin North Handyman: High-Ticket Home Repair for Doors, Walls, Trim, and Exterior Wear
excerpt: Summerlin North sits in northwest Las Vegas, north of Summerlin Parkway, inside the broader Summerlin master-planned area, so the homes tend to show wear in a more obvious way: a door that drifts, a ceiling seam that telegraphs in afternoon light, exterior trim that opens up on the sunny side. The valley’s native soils are shallow, well-drained alluvial soils with carbonates/caliche, which is why tiny movement can show up as latch misalignment, recurring drywall cracks, or fence and gate drift even when nothing looks “seriously wrong.” Then Summerlin’s climate piles on: extreme heat, strong sun, and monsoon-season flash flooding stress caulk lines, coatings, fasteners, and drainage details all at once. Seasonal behavior is pretty predictable around here—summer heat makes materials expand and dry out, then a storm day exposes every weak seam and splash-back point. We handle these as high-ticket repair packages instead of random one-offs: align the opening, reinforce the finish, correct the water path, and get the exterior sealed back up so the fix actually sticks.
markdown_tables:
| High-ticket Summerlin North package | What it usually includes | Representative total |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Whole-house punch list reset | doors, hardware, wall repair, trim, caulk, second-pass details | $2,500–$7,500 |
| Multi-room wall and ceiling finish package | crack repair, wide floats, texture blending, prime-ready finish | $2,000–$8,500 |
| Exterior trim and water-control scope | trim rebuilds, sealing, splash-back corrections, fascia touchpoints | $2,500–$9,500 |
| Fence and gate rebuild package | post/rail corrections, gate alignment, hardware reset | $2,000–$8,000 |
| Pre-listing “show-ready” project | function fixes + finish cleanup across key rooms and exterior sightlines | $3,500–$12,000 |
| Smart-home + door alignment bundle | locks, doorbells, cameras, strike tuning, sealing/details | $2,000–$7,000 |
